textPlain: Not much information here except to say it was moved into the Mach standard library [0] where apparently it doesn't even qualify for a separate README.Mach, apparently, is a game engine written in Zig. Looks interesting but given the lack of details on the repo [1] and site [2], and the fact that the main demo seems to be simply a spinning textured cube, I'd imagine it's very early days for this.[0] https://github.com/hexops/mach/tree/main/src/sysgpu[1] https://github.com/hexops/mach[2] https://machengine.org/

The value of WebGPUis that it's available in broswer, and also cross platform available on desktop.
Take the browser availability away and it's just another higher level Vulkan wrapper imo
